decision: Clearing: ops-agent context injection for troubleshooting

steps.action: Clearing: ops-agent context injection for troubleshooting
steps.notes: Built and tested. Added --ops-check flag to Clearing launcher — runs ops-agent.sh --dry-run, injects system state JSON into all role system prompts. Validated in live Clearing session (16 messages, roles referenced data correctly).

Self-review: launcher adds --ops-check flag, runs ops-agent --dry-run (read-only, zero cost), injects into CLEARING_CONTEXT env var. Tested in live session — grounding held, roles used data appropriately. Clean implementation.
